channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Spotify’s new Taste Profile feature lets users fine-tune their algorithm’s recommendations
item.description: You're responsible for your own Spotify algorithm now. On stage at SXSW, Spotify's co-CEO, Gustav Söderström, announced the Taste Profile feature, which allows users to personally customize exactly what they want to listen to, whether it's music, audiobooks or podcasts. This AI-powered feature is still in beta, and it will be available to Premium users in New Zealand in the coming weeks. From its short video demo, Spotify's Taste Profile feature will show you a summary of your listening habits and offer a "Tell us more" prompt at the bottom. With the new prompt, users can inform the AI what th...

item.title: Les Renault électrique à 1 400 km d’autonomie, rouler en électrique coûte 5 fois moins cher qu’un diesel et le nouveau vélo Decathlon – Le récap Survoltés
item.description: L'actualité électrique était dense cette semaine, avec le patron de Mercedes qui tire la sonnette d'alarme sur la voiture électrique, les 1 400 km d'autonomie des Renault électriques, le plein d'électricité 5 fois moins cher qu'en essence ou diesel.

item.title: Rosamund Pike Thinks the ‘Doom’ Movie Is So Bad It Nearly Killed Her Career
item.description: A lot of video game movies haven't been good, but to Pike, 'Doom' was bad enough to jeopardize her entire acting future.

item.title: Spotify says it made ‘big numbers’ last year — but it needs to invest in these 3 areas if it wants to please its loyal subscribers
item.description: There's a lot that Spotify could be investing in, but these three areas are the first that spring to mind.

item.title: Meta is reportedly laying off up to 20 percent of its staff
item.description: According to Reuters, Meta is looking to offset spending on AI and data centers with a massive round of layoffs. Sources familiar with the matter say the company could lay off as much as 20 percent of its staff, eliminating roughly 15,800 positions. That would be the largest series of layoffs at the company since […]

item.title: 'A classic honeypot': Movie fans catching up on Best Picture nominees targeted by dangerous malware ahead of of Oscars 2026
item.description: Don't be caught up in Oscars fever, as cybercriminals and scammers are lurking in the wings.

item.title: Chez Boulanger, cet écran PC Samsung Odyssey G9 3D 4K de 27″ à 165 Hz en met plein les yeux avec 65% de réduction
item.description: Le Samsung Odyssey 3D G9 G90XF est un écran PC gaming de qualité qui affiche de la 4K, mais aussi de la 3D à une fréquence de rafraîchissement de 165 Hz pour 599,99 euros au lieu de 1 699,99 euros.

item.title: Trump administration will reportedly get $10 billion for brokering the TikTok deal
item.description: There may have been some extra incentive for the Trump administration to get the TikTok US deal done. According to a report from The Wall Street Journal, the Trump administration is set to receive a total of $10 billion in the deal that allowed TikTok to remain in the US. The new investors who acquired stakes in the US entity of TikTok already paid a $2.5 billion fee to the administration when the deal closed in January, but WSJ's latest report noted that the group of investors would continue to make payments until the total hits $10 billion. After a group of investors, which includes Oracle a...

item.title: Meilleurs écouteurs ouverts en 2026 : le comparatif des open ear
item.description: Tout le monde n'aime pas les écouteurs intra-auriculaires. Que cela soit pour une question de confort ou encore pour la pratique du sport, voici les meilleurs modèles d'écouteurs ouverts que l'on vous conseille.

item.title: Why the new Best Casting Oscar is a win for unsung heroes across the workforce
item.description: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences added its first new award in two decades for this Sunday’s telecast—what that means for Hollywood, and for unrecognized workers in other industries. Think of your favorite movie. Maybe you love it for the plot, or the nostalgia you get from watching it again and again. Now think of that same movie, but all the actors have been shuffled: An American who can’t quite master a British accent, a 35-year-old playing a high schooler, a dramatic actor whose jokes fall flat....

item.title: The ‘Buffy’ Revival Is No Longer Happening
item.description: Hulu has put a stake in 'Buffy: New Sunnydale,' which would've seen Sarah Michelle Gellar return to kill vampires with a new, young Slayer.

item.title: Et si on arrêtait enfin de subir les caprices du Bluetooth ? Voici le Micro-power Wi-Fi
item.description: On a longtemps pensé que le Wi-Fi était trop gourmand pour nos petits écouteurs. C'était vrai, jusqu'à l'arrivée du Micro-power Wi-Fi. Une technologie qui promet de l'audio haute fidélité et une portée qui traverse les murs de votre appartement.
